new_terms.context: Intermediate Bus Converter used to step down 50VDC to 12VDC on the Strata Board.
A board that distributes 12VDC power to various modules in the compute tray.
A feature enabling dynamic power sharing between the CPU (Vera) and GPU (Rubin) based on workload demand.
Short for power semiconductors used in voltage regulator modules.
A high-density connector used for power/signal delivery in the chassis modules.
Cables used to route 50VDC power from the back of the chassis to the internal boards.
